new_terms.context: Apple funded yield learning, absorbed startup capacity, and extracted the best economics before competitors could reach volume.
AI accelerators from NVIDIA, AMD, and hyperscaler custom silicon have fundamentally reordered TSMC’s customer mix.
The countervailing trend is revenue per smartphone, which has tripled since 2012 and reached nearly $28 by 2025.
The 1.4nm ramp in 2029 shows Apple reclaiming 67% node share, suggesting strategic capacity reservations.
thanks to Apple’s relentless node transitions and innovations and Android companies’ increased emphasis on premium tier.
By 2Q26, AI ecosystem N3 demand (led by NVIDIA’s Blackwell successors) exceeds Apple’s N3 demand by nearly 3x.
